title: Artemis' Outposts
description: Adds 3 simple vanilla-friendly outposts to generate throughout your world.
body:
Adds 3 new abandoned outpost buildings that randomly generate throughout the world. Each outpost has random loot tables to make exploring them more interesting :)

Just pop the .zip file into your world's datapacks folder, and you're all set.
You can use the command "/locate structure artemisoutposts:outpost" while in game to find the closest outpost to you.

Pretty simple and vanilla friendly, I plan on making more structure and world gen packs in the future :p.

Hope you like it!
